title: Apply to export controlled goods
body: "Use this service to apply for licences and approvals you need to export controlled goods.  A good can be a physical item or something intangible like a training programme.  Licences and approvals you can apply for using this service   standard individual export licence (SIEL) Form 680 (F680) security approval   Sign in or set up an account  Start now   When not to use this service  Use SPIRE to apply:   for F680 approvals to release only unclassified International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR) items or information for temporary SIELs with multiple end users   for transhipment SIELs   SIELs for Category 0 goods, software and technology  to export Category 1 and Category 2 controlled radioactive sources  to export goods and provide ancillary services (these are services related to the export of tangible goods) to certain sanctioned destinations:  Belarus Burma (Myanmar) Iran Iraq Lebanon Libya North Korea (DPRK) Russia Syria Venezuela Zimbabwe     You must also use SPIRE to export goods, software and technology with the control list entries in the table:     Category Control list entries     Software 2D352, 3D006, 3E003h   Marine 8A002o4   Technology 9E003a2e, 9E003k   List of capital punishment and torture goods annex II 1.1 to 1.4, 2.1 to 2.8, 3.1 and 3.2, 4.1 and 4.2   List of capital punishment and torture goods annex III 1.1 to 1.3, 2.1 to 2.3, 3.1 to 3.6   List of capital punishment and torture goods annex IV 1.1     To provide standalone services, including professional and business services, to sanctioned destinations, apply for a licence to provide sanctioned trade services.  Before you start  If you’re part of an organisation, you will need a user account that is connected to your organisation’s account.  Create your account   Set up a GOV.UK One Login account. Follow the on-screen instructions to create your ‘apply to export controlled goods’ account. Follow the on-screen instructions to create an account for your organisation.   If your organisation already has an account, ask a colleague with access to add you. They can do this through the ‘manage your organisation and personal details’ link within ‘account home’.  Help with your application  Email lite.support@businessandtrade.gov.uk if you need access to SPIRE.  Read the SIEL guidance for more details on this licence, including supporting documents.  Read the F680 guidance for more information about this security approval.  Watch our export control webinars for support with registration and making a SIEL application.  For progress on your case or to give feedback on this service, contact the Export Control Joint Unit (ECJU) Helpdesk at exportcontrol.help@businessandtrade.gov.uk.  This service has been designed in line with the government accessibility strategy. However, if you encounter issues that affect your accessibility needs, contact lite.support@businessandtrade.gov.uk or call +44(0)20 7215 4594 (select option 2).  "
